wiki.summary: “who tf is u” is the sixth track to Nettspend’s debut studio album, early life crisis. It showcases Nettspend flowing over an distorted instrumental, which was produced by frequent collaborator CXO, while rapping about women. The instrumental consists of sliding synth melodies, with sliding hard-hitting bass and fast-paced percussion. Nettspend released “who tf is u” on March 6, 2026. Read more on Last.fm.
